triggers.name: Worn off: Strength of Nature
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "Nature's strength ebbs."

triggers.name: Worn off: Call of Earth
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "The Call of Earth leaves."

triggers.name: Worn off: Call of Fire
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "The Call of Fire leaves." — shared by 2 spells in spells_us_str (1 castable; also: NPC-only ranks). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Eagle Eye
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "The avian presence departs." — shared by 3 spells in spells_us_str (2 castable; also: Falcon Eye). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Ancient: Legacy of Blades
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "The brambles fall away." — shared by 22 spells in spells_us_str (8 castable; also: Legacy of Spike, Legacy of Thorn, Shield of Barbs, Shield of Brambles, Shield of Spikes). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Call of Ice
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "The call of ice leaves."

triggers.name: Worn off: Jolting Blades
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "The magical aura fades." — shared by 31 spells in spells_us_str (1 castable; also: NPC-only ranks). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Trueshot Discipline
triggers.pattern: ^The natural energy fades from your bow\.$
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "The natural energy fades from your bow." — shared by 13 spells in spells_us_str (1 castable; also: NPC-only ranks). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Call of the Predator
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "The predator's spirit departs." — shared by 5 spells in spells_us_str (2 castable; also: Mark of the Predator). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Pack Shrew
triggers.pattern: ^The spirit of the shrew leaves you\.$
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "The spirit of the shrew leaves you." — shared by 2 spells in spells_us_str (2 castable; also: Spirit of the Shrew). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Spirit of Wolf
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "The spirit of wolf leaves you." — shared by 3 spells in spells_us_str (2 castable; also: Pack Spirit). Named after the community-likely spell (WEAR_OFF_LIKELY).

triggers.name: Invis cleared: Improved Invisibility
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "You appear." — shared by 32 spells in spells_us_str (4 castable; also: Improved Superior Camouflage, Invisibility, Superior Camouflage). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell. — invis wear-off: cancels the shared Invisibility timer.

triggers.name: Worn off: Levitate
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "You can no longer levitate." — shared by 13 spells in spells_us_str (2 castable; also: Levitation). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Chloroplast
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "You have stopped regenerating." — shared by 54 spells in spells_us_str (8 castable; also: Nature's Recovery, Pack Chloroplast, Pack Regeneration, Regeneration, Regrowth). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Enduring Breath
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "You resume breathing." — shared by 9 spells in spells_us_str (2 castable; also: Everlasting Breath). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Invis cleared: Camouflage
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "You return to view." — shared by 12 spells in spells_us_str (1 castable; also: NPC-only ranks). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell. — invis wear-off: cancels the shared Invisibility timer.

triggers.name: Worn off: Agility
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "Your agility fades." — shared by 6 spells in spells_us_str (4 castable; also: Deliriously Nimble, Feet like Cat, Nimble). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Bind Sight

triggers.name: Worn off: Acumen

triggers.name: Worn off: Bladecoat
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "Your skin returns to normal." — shared by 64 spells in spells_us_str (25 castable; also: Bobbing Corpse, Diamondskin, Leatherskin, Manasink, Manaskin). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Furious Strength
